title: Video Friday: These Robots Were Born to Run
title_zh: Video Friday：这些机器人天生就会跑
abstract: Video Friday is your weekly selection of awesome robotics videos, collected by your friends at   IEEE Spectrum   robotics. We also post a weekly calendar of upcoming robotics events for the next few months. Please   send us your events   for inclusion.    ICRA 2026 : 1–5 June 2026, VIENNA  Enjoy today’s videos!          All legged robots deployed “in the wild” to date were given a body plan that w
abstract_zh: Video Friday 是您每周精选的精彩机器人视频集锦，由 IEEE Spectrum 机器人的朋友们为您收集。我们还会发布未来几个月的机器人活动日历。请将您的活动发送给我们，以便收录。ICRA 2026：2026 年 6 月 1-5 日，维也纳。享受今天的视频吧！迄今为止所有“野外”部署的腿式机器人都有给定的身体结构，但……
tldr_zh: 每周精选机器人视频，展示天生会跑的腿式机器人。
cover_zh: 这些机器人天生就会跑｜野外部署的腿式机器人视频合集
